_README: Per-creator brand config. The skill writes this on first run by interviewing you (see SKILL.md 'First run: brand discovery'). Save the real file at <footage>/.yap_build/brand-config.json or the skill root. yapfull.sh reads it. Replace the values below with yours.

_fields.caption_font: installed font family for captions ('Montserrat Black' = default ALL-CAPS look, or a brand display font in sentence case)
_fields.label_font: font for the handle/contact block (a mono reads well, e.g. 'Space Mono')
_fields.handle: on-screen handle at the CTA, e.g. 'YOURNAME.COM'
_fields.contact_lines: extra lines under the handle (email, site)
_fields.cta_clip: OPTIONAL absolute path to a reusable spoken-outro clip; add it as the final clause in each clauses.json

creator: Your Name
niche: what your channel is about, one line
